videos.title: UK | 16th April, Thursday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 16th April, Thursday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch 16/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 16/04/26

videos.title: David Roddy on his NBA journey + why he fits well with Nikola Jokić & the Nuggets
videos.summary_source_text:
David Roddy on his NBA journey + why he fits well with Nikola Jokić & the Nuggets Justin Michael starts the podcast by talking about the latest offensive line commit for CSU Football and a brief update on the portal for CSU men’s basketball. He then continues Tuesday’s conversation about former Rams playing well in the NBA and plays his exclusive interview with David Roddy about his NBA journey. Roddy dives into what he’s learned about himself, how he’s grown and what he sees his ideal role being. He also talks about why it’s easy to play with Nikola Jokić and the Nuggets stars. Finally, Justin gives an update on spring football for CSU, talks about returning players who could make a leap in 2026 and interviews with running backs coach David Hill and running back Mel Brown.

0:00 - Intro 
5:30 - CSU football lands a new commit
11:15 - CSU hoops portal update
18:00 - Nuggets player and former CSU standout David Roddy joins the show
37:00 - CSU Spring camp updates

STANDING OVATION for Kopitar! Emotional Send-Off in Final Regular-Season Game 👏 Anze Kopitar receives a heartfelt standing ovation from Calgary Flames fans in the final regular-season game of his remarkable career. After the game, Flames players line up to shake his hand, showing respect for the longtime Kings captain and his 20-year NHL career, honoring one of the game’s most respected veterans.

Claude Opus 4.7: The Trustworthy Agent Upgrade (X-High Effort, Vision, Memory, Ultra Review)

Claude Opus 4.7 has been released and early testers report it feels more intelligent, agentic, precise, and trustworthy for multi-step work with less supervision. Key changes include a major instruction-following upgrade (more literal, word-for-word execution that may require retuning older prompts), a new “X high effort” setting that’s now the default in Claude Code for more careful output at higher token cost, and a big vision upgrade that supports images up to 3.7 megapixels for clearer analysis of screenshots, spreadsheets, contracts, and dashboards. Anthropic also highlights improved file-system-based memory for multi-session projects, beta “task budgets” on the API for cost control across long runs, and new Claude Code features like /ultra review plus expanded auto mode. The script recommends updating prompts, testing effort levels, using vision and memory, and running ultra reviews before shipping, and notes added cyber safeguards.

Open Claw 4.15 Update: Opus 4.7, Cloud Memory, Lean Local Mode & Major Reliability Fixes

This episode breaks down the Open Claw 4.15 release, focusing on practical upgrades that improve stability and workflow reliability. Key changes include Anthropic Opus 4.7 support with bundled image understanding, cloud storage support for the LanceDB memory index, and bounded memory reads to prevent context bloat in long sessions. Dreaming output is now stored separately (memory/dreaming) to keep daily memory files clean. For local/self-hosted models, an experimental “local model lean mode” trims heavyweight tools to improve smaller-model consistency, alongside a fix for Ollama model ID prefixes. The update also patches Codex runtime issues, adds a Control UI Model Auth status card for token health and rate-limit pressure, integrates Google Gemini text-to-speech, and ships broad security/stability fixes including default tool-loop detection, immediate skill snapshot updates, small-context-window compaction fixes, WhatsApp encrypted media improvements, BlueBubbles catch-up/deduplication, secrets redaction in exec approvals, and a Linux systemd startup loop fix.

videos.title: Alan Roach - The Voice Behind the Biggest Moments in Sports | OTGS Ep. 32
videos.summary_source_text:
Alan Roach - The Voice Behind the Biggest Moments in Sports | OTGS Ep. 32 Who is the voice you hear at the biggest sporting events in the world? On this episode of The Other Tom Green Show, Tom Green sits down with legendary public address announcer Alan Roach — the iconic voice of the Colorado Avalanche, Denver Broncos, Super Bowl, Olympics, X Games, and more.

Alan shares incredible stories from behind the microphone, how he landed the Rockies job at the last minute, what it’s like announcing the Super Bowl, handling chaos during major events, and why public address announcing has become one of the most unique careers in sports.

From Mile High Stadium to the Olympics, this is a fascinating conversation with one of the most recognizable voices in sports.

⏱️ CHAPTERS

00:00 Intro – The history of public address announcers
01:11 Legendary voices: Bob Sheppard & the “Voice of God”
03:57 Alan Roach joins the show
05:01 How Alan became the voice of the Rockies
06:13 Landing the Rockies job after 18 months of persistence
07:19 Favorite player introductions: Larry Walker, Galarraga & more
09:06 The importance of pronunciation in sports announcing

12:14 Growing up in Minnesota & discovering broadcasting

47:43 What’s next for Alan Roach
50:26 Closing thoughts

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 1 | RBC Heritage | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Round 1 | RBC Heritage | 2026 Check out all the best shots from Round 1 at the 2026 RBC Heritage, featuring Ludvig Åberg, Scottie Scheffler, Viktor Hovland and Rickie Fowler, among others.

Fresh off The Masters, where Rory McIlroy went back-to-back to join an elite group of repeat champions, the PGA TOUR heads to the Lowcountry for the RBC Heritage at Harbour Town Golf Links. This Signature Event features a no-cut field and a loaded lineup, highlighted by defending champion Justin Thomas, who returns after his dramatic playoff win in 2025. World No. 1 Scottie Scheffler arrives off a runner-up finish at Augusta and looks to add another Harbour Town title, while Cameron Young brings serious momentum after a T3 at the Masters and a win at THE PLAYERS Championship. Keep an eye on Matt Fitzpatrick, already a winner this spring, and Jordan Spieth, a past champion with a strong track record at Harbour Town. Meanwhile, Collin Morikawa returns after a solid showing at Augusta, and Xander Schauffele continues a run of consistent form. Don’t overlook FedExCup contender Jacob Bridgeman, who’s been one of the breakout performers of the season, or Max Homa, who had another strong major showing. With a stacked field, no cut, and one of the TOUR’s most iconic layouts, Harbour Town sets the stage for another high-level week on the PGA TOUR.

videos.summary_source_text:
Broncos Hint at TRADING UP in Draft, Evan Engram's Role, TOP Targets & More Inside Broncos News The Denver Broncos may not pick until No. 62, but Sean Payton and George Paton made it clear in their pre-draft press conference that Denver is locked in on a key 45-to-75 range, fueling real buzz that the Broncos could trade up in the 2026 NFL Draft for one of their top targets. This video breaks down the biggest Broncos draft hints, the positions and player traits Denver is targeting, and what the latest inside Broncos news means for Bo Nix and the roster moving forward. Plus, Sean Payton shut down any questions about Evan Engram’s future by making clear the veteran tight end is still a key piece of the offense and someone the Broncos want to keep featured even more. Zac Stevens goes inside Broncos for the latest updates & news for Broncos Country.

videos.title: Ludvig Åberg fires 8-under 63 | Round 1 | RBC Heritage | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
Ludvig Åberg fires 8-under 63 | Round 1 | RBC Heritage | 2026 In the opening round of the 2026 RBC Heritage, Ludvig Åberg shoots an 8-under 63 and takes the solo lead after Thursday in Hilton Head Island, SC.

Fresh off The Masters, where Rory McIlroy went back-to-back to join an elite group of repeat champions, the PGA TOUR heads to the Lowcountry for the RBC Heritage at Harbour Town Golf Links. This Signature Event features a no-cut field and a loaded lineup, highlighted by defending champion Justin Thomas, who returns after his dramatic playoff win in 2025. World No. 1 Scottie Scheffler arrives off a runner-up finish at Augusta and looks to add another Harbour Town title, while Cameron Young brings serious momentum after a T3 at the Masters and a win at THE PLAYERS Championship. Keep an eye on Matt Fitzpatrick, already a winner this spring, and Jordan Spieth, a past champion with a strong track record at Harbour Town. Meanwhile, Collin Morikawa returns after a solid showing at Augusta, and Xander Schauffele continues a run of consistent form. Don’t overlook FedExCup contender Jacob Bridgeman, who’s been one of the breakout performers of the season, or Max Homa, who had another strong major showing. With a stacked field, no cut, and one of the TOUR’s most iconic layouts, Harbour Town sets the stage for another high-level week on the PGA TOUR.

videos.title: Episode 42: Rangers Post-Mortem | Tri-State Hockey Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Episode 42: Rangers Post-Mortem | Tri-State Hockey Podcast The Rangers’ season is officially over, and that means it’s time for a full post-mortem. On Episode 42 of the Tri-State Hockey Podcast presented by bet365, Jonny Lazarus is joined by Arthur Staple and Mike Rupp to break down everything that went wrong for the New York Rangers this season. From the early-season offensive struggles and major injuries to questions about the team’s leadership, roster construction, and front-office direction, the guys take a deep dive into how the year unraveled.

They also debate what comes next for the Rangers — including whether the team should trade a potential top draft pick, the future of Vincent Trocheck, possible offseason trade targets, and whether the organization needs a major roster reset or just a few strategic moves. Plus, the guys react to fan voicemails about the team’s direction and discuss potential free-agent fits that could reshape the Rangers lineup next season.

Presented by bet365

#NYR

Chapters

0:00 Intro — Rangers season officially over
0:12 Setting up the Rangers post-mortem
0:54 Arthur Staple on the bizarre season and early struggles
2:40 Offensive issues and injuries derail the year
4:41 Late-season positives and what they mean
5:11 Are the Rangers actually closer than they appear?
6:16 Mike Rupp’s positives from the season
8:15 Voicemail: Should the Rangers trade their top draft pick?
9:32 Debating a potential blockbuster trade for a star forward
12:02 Rangers roster timeline and long-term contracts
15:17 Are the Rangers stuck between competing and rebuilding?
18:20 Debate: Building around stars vs improving depth
21:01 What if J.T. Miller regresses next season?
24:10 Looking at Rangers production after Christmas
27:22 Voicemail: Should the Rangers keep Vincent Trocheck?
29:29 Trocheck trade value and offseason decisions
33:04 Could the Rangers keep Trocheck into next season?
35:23 Why the Rangers still aren’t a playoff team yet
40:56 Why Braden Schneider might be the most likely trade piece
43:09 Free-agent and trade targets for the Rangers
48:24 Could bringing back Mats Zuccarello make sense?

videos.title: Elon Musk vs Sam Altman Gets UGLY… OpenAI Built AGI and Hid It? | The Late Byte with Robi
videos.summary_source_text:
Elon Musk vs Sam Altman Gets UGLY… OpenAI Built AGI and Hid It? | The Late Byte with Robi Robi's back behind the desk — and the internet had a week.
In tonight's episode: leaked court documents from the Musk vs OpenAI trial suggest GPT-4o may have been classified internally as AGI… and then quietly retired. What happened, who benefited, and why is everyone acting like nothing happened?

Plus: A Cursor AI agent left unsupervised for four days cracks a math problem that stumped human researchers. And Jack Dorsey blames AI for laying off 40% of Block's workforce — but did AI really take those jobs, or just take the blame?

This is The Late Byte with Robi — your weekly dose of AI news, served with sarcasm and zero bathroom breaks.

Timestamps:

videos.title: Do This After Every Meal, Especially After Carbs
videos.summary_source_text:
Do This After Every Meal, Especially After Carbs Most people sit right after eating, and that simple habit may be keeping your blood sugar elevated longer than it should. In this video, I show you a powerful, easy technique you can do immediately after a meal that helps your muscles pull sugar out of the bloodstream and use it for energy, without medication, supplements, or intense exercise. When blood sugar stays high, it leads to glycation, where glucose sticks to proteins and contributes to higher A1c levels over time, but activating your muscles can change that quickly. You’ll learn how simple contractions, even while sitting, can improve glucose uptake, support metabolism, and help your body handle carbs more efficiently. This is something anyone can do anywhere, and it starts working right away, so try it after your next meal and feel the difference.

*********************************

Please share this video with your friends and family.  Wishing you and your family many Blessings!  ❤️😊🙏 Dr M

videos.title: Gemini 3.2 Explained: 77% Benchmark Leap, $0.25/M Tokens & What Google Is Hiding
videos.summary_source_text:
Gemini 3.2 Explained: 77% Benchmark Leap, $0.25/M Tokens & What Google Is Hiding 🔗 Try TicNote Cloud: https://ticnote.com/?via=bitbiasedai

Everyone's talking about Gemini 3.2 — but does it actually exist? I went through every official Google document, API changelog, and developer page to find out. What I discovered is far more interesting than a version number.

In this video, I break down everything we actually know about Google's Gemini 3 family: the 77.1% ARC-AGI-2 score (up from under 5%), Flash-Lite at $0.25 per million tokens, the real-time voice play with Flash Live, and how it all stacks up against GPT-4o, Llama 3, and Claude 3. Plus the privacy and security details that could save your next AI project.

videos.title: McLellan Follows Bowness + Matthews & Ovechkin Comments ft. Greg Wyshynski | The Sheet
videos.summary_source_text:
McLellan Follows Bowness + Matthews & Ovechkin Comments ft. Greg Wyshynski | The Sheet Jeff Marek and Greg Wyshynski are back with another edition of The Sheet breaking down the biggest storylines across the NHL as the regular season winds down. The guys react to the fallout from Columbus Blue Jackets head coach Rick Bowness blasting his team after their season-ending loss and saying “these guys don’t care,” sparking debate around the league and responses from players pushing back on the comments.

They also dive into the Detroit Red Wings’ brutal 8-1 loss to the Florida Panthers and Todd McLellan following Bowness’ lead by publicly calling out his team’s performance as Detroit’s season comes to a disappointing close. Then it’s locker cleanout day around the NHL, with Toronto Maple Leafs captain Auston Matthews addressing the uncertain future in Toronto and Washington Capitals superstar Alex Ovechkin making it clear he still wants to return and continue playing. Jeff and Greg break down the fallout, the leadership dynamics behind coaches publicly challenging their players, and what these comments could mean heading into the offseason.

Subscribe to the Daily Faceoff YouTube channel for more NHL analysis, insider coverage, and daily hockey conversation.

videos.title: Florida Panthers GM Bill Zito at the End of the 2025-26 Season, Champs Miss Playoffs
videos.summary_source_text:
Florida Panthers GM Bill Zito at the End of the 2025-26 Season, Champs Miss Playoffs Florida Panthers general manager Bill Zito meets the media after his team wrapped up its season at the IcePlex in Fort Lauderdale on April 16, 2026. 

The Panthers won three straight to end the season but will end the season out of the Stanley Cup Playoffs. 

Florida won the past two Stanley Cup championships. 

The two-time Stanley Cup champions will miss the playoffs for the first time since 2019. 

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

videos.title: Inside the Most Advanced Golf Assessment I’ve Ever Had - What It Revealed
videos.summary_source_text:
Inside the Most Advanced Golf Assessment I’ve Ever Had - What It Revealed Stop guessing what to work on in your golf game. Build your Personal Game Plan with Me and My Golf  👉 https://meandmygolf.com/game-plan/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=16.04.26

Find a TPI Certified golf coach, fitness trainer or medical practitioner near you: https://www.mytpi.com/experts
 
Subscribe to MyTPI’s YouTube channel  - https://www.youtube.com/@MyTPI

We travelled to the Titleist Performance Institute (TPI) to spend time with Dave Phillips and Dr. Greg Rose and put Piers through a full TPI physical screen.

The goal? To uncover what’s really influencing his golf swing and what might be holding him back.

From mobility and stability testing to analysing his swing using 3D motion capture and force plates, we explored how his body affects everything from driver to irons to short game.

But this wasn’t just about collecting data. It was about building a clear plan.
Not only to improve Piers’ swing mechanics, but to understand how he should train his body to work with his limitations, not against them.

videos.title: Florida Panthers Captain Sasha Barkov Talks Missing 2025-26 Season, Playing for Finland at Worlds
videos.summary_source_text:
Florida Panthers Captain Sasha Barkov Talks Missing 2025-26 Season, Playing for Finland at Worlds Florida Panthers captain Aleksander Sasha Barkov meets the media after his team wrapped up its season at the IcePlex in Fort Lauderdale on April 16, 2026. 

Barkov missed the entire season after injuring his right knee on his first day of training camp. 

He confirmed Thursday that he would play for Finland at the upcoming World Championships.

The Panthers won three straight to end the season but will end the season out of the Stanley Cup Playoffs. 

Florida won the past two Stanley Cup championships. 

The two-time Stanley Cup champions will miss the playoffs for the first time since 2019. 

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

Marchand missed parts of January and February as well as the final month of the season due to lingering problems with a past injury. He mentioned he still may need surgery for it.

The Panthers won three straight to end the season but will end the season out of the Stanley Cup Playoffs.

The guys dig through the most likely prospects the Denver Broncos could choose at pick No. 62. Emmanuel Pregnon? CJ Allen? Sam Roush? Jadarian Price? Caleb Banks?

videos.summary_source_text:
PGA Tour Coach: You’re Fixing Golf’s #1 Problem WRONG… In this video, I take another lesson with PGA TOUR & DP World Tour coach Alex Buckner to dive deeper into what might actually be causing golf’s #1 problem.

In Part 1, we uncovered a key concept around low point and strike… but in this session, Alex breaks down the real reason so many golfers still struggle with consistent ball striking even when they think they’re fixing it.

videos.title: Paul Maurice: Wrapping Up the 2025-26 NHL Season in Fort Lauderdale
videos.summary_source_text:
Paul Maurice: Wrapping Up the 2025-26 NHL Season in Fort Lauderdale Florida Panthers coach Paul Maurice meets the media after his team wrapped up its season at the IcePlex in Fort Lauderdale on April 16, 2026. 

The Panthers won three straight to end the season but will end the season out of the Stanley Cup Playoffs. 

Florida won the past two Stanley Cup championships. 

The two-time Stanley Cup champions will miss the playoffs for the first time since 2019. 

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

The Panthers Have Done It Again, Repeat as Cup Champs: https://floridahockeynow.com/florida-panthers-repeat-stanley-cup-champions-2025/

videos.title: InclawAI Review: Run OpenClaw AI Agents Without Setup (No Code, $60 Free Tokens)
videos.summary_source_text:
InclawAI Review: Run OpenClaw AI Agents Without Setup (No Code, $60 Free Tokens) 👉 Try InclawAI here: https://cutt.ly/BtFpjpvO

Running an AI agent like OpenClaw sounds powerful… until you actually try setting it up.

In this video, I tested InclawAI — a fully managed hosting platform that lets you run OpenClaw without servers, coding, or DevOps. From setup to real-world automation, I break down how it works, what you get, and whether it’s actually worth it.

We’re talking:
• AI agents running 24/7 in the background
• WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack automation
• Multi-step workflows and real task execution
• Built-in token credits (no API setup needed)
• Real pricing vs self-hosting

OpenClaw itself is powerful because it can automate tasks across apps and run continuously like a personal assistant — but the setup is where most people quit. This is exactly the problem InclawAI is trying to solve.

⏱️ Timestamps:

00:01 - The OpenClaw Problem
02:37 - InclawAI Walkthrough
05:14 - What Happens Behind the Scenes
07:12 - Things to Keep In Mind
09:21 - Final Verdict

By the end, you’ll know whether this is just convenience… or the easiest way to actually use AI agents in your workflow.

videos.title: Labeda Evo Spacer System Review
videos.summary_source_text:
Labeda Evo Spacer System Review IW Hockey reviews the Labeda Evo Spacer System. 

Compared to traditional spacer systems that have a large gap between the bearings, the Evo Spacers are able to concentrate power through the center of the wheel. This allows players to flex the entire wheel and not just the top part of the urethane, creating significantly more speed-promoting rebound and much better gripping power. Another important improvement of having the bearings right next to each is to prevent bearing bind and the massive glide and power decrease that occurs in traditional wheels.

Western Conference Chaos & Senators vs Hurricanes Preview | Daily Faceoff Live Welcome to Daily Faceoff Live!

The Pacific Division title is on the line tonight as the Western Conference playoff picture reaches its final turning point.

We break down what’s at stake in the Pacific Division and how tonight’s games could shape the Western Conference playoff bracket. Plus, we dive into a fascinating trend surrounding the Colorado Avalanche and their push toward the 120-point mark.

Connor McDavid officially captures another Art Ross Trophy, tying for the second-most scoring titles in NHL history. How many more scoring titles could he realistically win — and what does that mean for his legacy?

We also discuss Rick Bowness’ future in Columbus following recent reports, and whether the Chicago Blackhawks could realistically take a step toward becoming a playoff team next season.

With the NHL Draft Lottery now set, the Toronto Maple Leafs and New York Rangers lock into 28th and 29th overall odds — but which franchise needs lottery luck more?

Plus, Jason York joins to preview the upcoming Ottawa Senators vs Carolina Hurricanes playoff series and break down what to expect from both teams heading into the postseason.

videos.title: Playoff Preview & Cap Crunching ft. Keith Kavanaugh | Morning Cuppa Hockey
videos.summary_source_text:
Playoff Preview & Cap Crunching ft. Keith Kavanaugh | Morning Cuppa Hockey Season 3 of Morning Cuppa Hockey rolls on as Jonny Lazarus and Colby Cohen brew up a massive episode to kick off the postseason! The regular season is in the rearview mirror, and it’s time to see who actually has what it takes to hoist the Cup.

The guys dive straight into the deep end, debating the matchups and locking in their official 2026 Stanley Cup Playoff Picks. From dark horse upsets to the heavy hitters in the East and West, Jonny and Colby break down every series with the insight (and the arguments) you’ve come to expect.

To wrap things up, we go under the hood of the business side of the game. Keith Kavanaugh from PuckPedia joins the show to discuss the playoff salary cap, roster management, and how the league's top contenders are navigating the "chess match" of the postseason.

REGULAR SEASON AWARD TIME! Carolina Hurricanes' 2025-26 Team Award Winners The Carolina Hurricanes finished the regular season with a 53-22-7 record and 113 points. They claimed the first seed in the Eastern Conference and won their fourth division title in the last six seasons. All of that being said,  who helped lead the way throughout the season? On the Thursday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on who won the team MVP for the Hurricanes in 2025-26. Does he align with the Carolina Chapter of the Professional Hockey Writers Association (PHWA), which picked goaltender Brandon Bussi? Did his 31-6-2 record and being the lifeline in the crease be enough to put him over the edge? Who else should be considered? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on the best forward for the Hurricanes this season. Who stood out above the rest? Will it come down to points, overall play, or a full encompassing of the season as a whole? Finally, Zach picks his best defenseman of the season for the Canes. Who stood out in a season where almost the whole defense missed games? Did one of the guys from the Chicago Wolves give themselves a case to be named? Who are some honorable mentions? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

Max Hermes (Minimax) Cloud Agent: 1-Click Setup, Real Tests, and Why It’s Not Ready Yet

The episode tests Minimax’s newly released Max Hermes, a cloud-hosted, one-click deployable version of the Hermes AI agent aimed at non-technical users. The host subscribes to the monthly plan, deploys Max Hermes in about 10 seconds, and compares it to running Hermes in a terminal, highlighting built-in skills like web access plus image and video generation that work out of the box. However, during testing Max Hermes produces a confusing response to a web query, appears buggy, responds slowly, and repeatedly gets stuck without replying. The host also notes Max Hermes lacks documentation and key settings found in Max Claw (like app connections, dashboards, and scheduled task management). Overall, they do not recommend switching to Max Hermes yet and suggest Max Claw or learning local Hermes instead, while mentioning their AI Profit Board courses and community support.

videos.title: Why Drinking 8 Glasses of Water Per Day is a Myth
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Drinking 8 Glasses of Water Per Day is a Myth How much water should you drink each day? Discover the truth behind the 8 glasses a day myth, the side effects of drinking too much water, and proper hydration tips to keep you hydrated and support overall health. 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

0:00 Introduction: The drink water myth 
1:28 Hydration facts
3:43 Water intake truth
4:10 Thirst and your daily water needs
6:57 Does everyone need 8 glasses of water?
7:06 Urine color and hydration explained 
8:04 Overhydration risks

Download Dr. Berg’s Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/4ccJatb

Keep watching for more hydration tips:
▶️ https://youtu.be/f7bQGGW3UTg
▶️ https://youtu.be/nJEAqOdnF2E
▶️ https://youtu.be/0p7JvFrEqiQ

Thirst tells the body when to drink. There isn’t a single clinical trial that has established exactly how much water we need each day to stay healthy, so where did the “8 glasses of water per day” recommendation come from?

A recommendation published in 1945 suggested consuming approximately 2.5 liters of water per day, but it also noted that most of this intake would come from food. The average person gets close to 1 liter of water from food daily, and the body also produces metabolic water.

Over time, “8 glasses a day” turned into drinking even when you’re not thirsty, but thirst tells the body when to drink fluid. A person’s daily water needs depend on age, body size, physical activity, climate, and other factors, so the number will vary from person to person. 

Urine color can help indicate your hydration level. Dark urine means you need more water, while clear urine may indicate overhydration, which can negatively affect electrolyte balance.

Hyponatremia, low sodium in the blood, is a potential risk of overhydration.

 ✅ 7:22 Why Standing Up Is a Rotation + Side Bend Problem

In This Video, You'll Discover:
• How to stay down in your golf swing the right way — using trail side down instead of chest down to finally achieve consistent, solid contact 
• Why keeping your chest down through the ball is the mistake most high handicap golfersmake — and what the best ball strikers do instead 
• The "Chest Out, Trail Side Down, Hips Forward" mantra that transforms your impact position with any club 
• A simple rib cage drill any golfer can do at home to feel the correct trail side movement in seconds 
• How getting your trail side down automatically pushes your lead hip into the correct position — no extra thought required 
• Golf swing tips used by PGA Tour players to maintain their spine angle from setup all the way through the follow through 
• How to use the Swing Coach app to identify if you're standing up early — and stop it for good

Most golfers who struggle with ball striking have one thing in common: they're trying to stay down by keeping their chest toward the ground, which actually causes early extension and inconsistent contact. Eric Cogorno breaks down the real key — rotating your chest out toward the target while your trail shoulder, pec, and rib cage drive down through the ball. This golf swing analysis of PGA Tour players shows exactly what separates consistent ball strikers from the rest. Whether you're working with a golf swing coach or self-coaching with golf drills at home, mastering this trail side movement is one of the highest-leverage changes any amateur can make.

videos.title: R&B Star Keenan Trevon Talks Music Journey, Buy Me Flowers Tour & Supporting Local | Weekly Cut
videos.summary_source_text:
R&B Star Keenan Trevon Talks Music Journey, Buy Me Flowers Tour & Supporting Local | Weekly Cut This week on Weekly Cut, Justin Simmons and Louis Romero sit down with rising Denver R&B artist Keenan Trevon for an inspiring conversation about music, motivation, and what it takes to chase your dreams. From Motown family roots to building his name in Denver and Aurora, Keenan shares the personal story behind his rise and what’s next with the Buy Me Flowers Tour.

Keenan opens up about the artists who shaped his sound, the emotional process behind creating music, why live performances are so powerful, and how fans can truly support independent artists in today’s streaming era. If you love music, local culture, and authentic stories, this is an episode you don’t want to miss.

videos.summary_source_text:
Golf is CRAZY at altitude 😅🇿🇦 Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

Honest, independent testing of the latest drivers, irons, putters, golf balls and tech.

https://golf.ecco.com

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rickshielspga/
Website: http://www.rickshiels.com/

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

videos.title: I specced a Bugatti Tourbillon!
videos.summary_source_text:
I specced a Bugatti Tourbillon! Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-16-04

What happens when you have a blank check and the keys to two of the most exclusive hypercars in the world? Today, Mat is living every petrolhead’s wildest dream…

He’s flown over to Bugatti chateau, and then back to the UK, and he’s speccing two of the most desirable cars in the world - the Bugatti Tourbillon, and the GMA T.50! 

First up, Mat pays a visit to Bugatti. Guided by one of Bugatti’s lead designers, he has to navigate a world of limitless carbon fibre, ‘standard’ paint jobs that cost more than a house, and a whole load of bespoke specifications which include adding 8(!) exhaust tips to the rear of the car! The question is, will he go for something sleek and minimalist, or will he choose to go for something that screams opulence? 

As a reminder, the Tourbillon is powered by an 8.3-litre naturally aspirated V16 + 3 electric motors, and these combine to produce 1,800hp. It redlines at 9,000rpm, and it has a top speed of 276mph!

Then, things get personal. Mat heads to Gordon Murray Automotive to spec the T.50, and he’s not just talking to a salesperson - he’s sitting down with the legend himself, Gordon Murray! This is the spiritual successor to the McLaren F1, where every gram of weight is scrutinised. From the fan-assisted aero to the centre-seat driving position, Gordon guides Mat through the art of perfection through lightness, while also offering his own recommendations to Mat’s choices. He’ll also reveal his own bespoke T.50 specification at the end of the video! 

The T.50 is powered by a 3.9-litre Cosworth V12, and it weighs in at only 997kg! It redlines at an incredible 12,100rpm, and it’ll come as no surprise that it’s only available with a 6-speed manual gearbox!

So one is a V16 hybrid monster, while the other is a lightweight V12 masterpiece focused on the pure connection between driver and road. The question is, which will Mat prefer? You’ll need to keep watching to see for yourself! Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-16-04

videos.summary_source_text:
Build AI Voice Agents with Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS Want to make money and save time with AI? Get AI Coaching, Support & Courses 👉 https://www.skool.com/ai-profit-lab-7462/about

Get the video notes + links to the tools → https://www.skool.com/ai-profit-lab-7462/about

Want to know how I make videos like these? Join the AI Profit Boardroom → https://www.skool.com/ai-profit-lab-7462/about

Get a FREE AI SEO Strategy Session: https://go.juliangoldie.com/strategy-session?utm=julian

Build AI Voice Agents with Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS (Audio Tags, 70+ Languages) in Google AI Studio

The video tests Google’s new Gemini 3.1 Flash Text-to-Speech (TTS) update and shows how to generate expressive audio and build AI voice-agent apps in Google AI Studio. It highlights improvements over the older 2.5 model, including more natural voices, speaker-level controls, audio tags, and support for 70+ languages, plus customization for style, pace, accent, and multiple voice presets. The walkthrough covers using the Generate Speech playground, adding an API key, switching voices via composer, and then using the Build section to create a text-to-speech app you can preview, export code for, download audio from, remix, and publish (publishing/deployment is paid, testing is free). It also reviews Artificial Analysis TTS leaderboard positioning, cost/quality tradeoffs, and notes audio watermarking via SynthID. The episode ends by promoting the AI Profit Boardroom community and trainings.

Gemini CLI Subagents: Build Free AI Agent Teams in Your Terminal (Claude Code Alternative)

The script explains Google’s Gemini CLI new Subagents feature and shows how to install and start using Gemini CLI for free in the terminal, sign in, restart, and then create and manage teams of specialized AI subagents. It describes how subagents delegate complex or repetitive work in parallel, each with its own context window, system instructions, and tool access to keep the main session focused. The walkthrough covers built-in agents (Generalist, CLI Help, Codebase Investigator), listing agents via /agents, calling agents with @agentname, enabling parallel agents, and creating custom agents by writing a markdown file with settings and guidelines and placing it in the Gemini agents folder, with a caution to avoid multiple agents editing the same files. videos.title: UK | 15th April, Wednesday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 15th April, Wednesday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch 15/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 15/04/26

1 tablespoon cocoa.

Let set until firm.

videos.title: NHL Without a Map – Season 14, Jakso 11: Leijonalegenda Mikael Granlund & Suomi-kiekon tulevaisuus
videos.summary_source_text:
NHL Without a Map – Season 14, Jakso 11: Leijonalegenda Mikael Granlund & Suomi-kiekon tulevaisuus Hollywood jää taakse ja suuntaamme kohti Anaheimia. Luksus vaihtuu hieman vaatimattomampaan hotellielämään. Pienen jännityksen kautta aamu valkenee kuitenkin Kalifornian auringossa, ja päivä startataan tyylikkäästi aamu-uinnilla Buena Parkissa. Anaheimissa ohjelmassa on paljon muutakin kuin turistimeininkiä. Nousemme Newport Coastin kukkuloille tapaamaan suomalaista NHL-tähteä Mikael Granlundia, joka avaa ajatuksiaan urasta, Kalifornia-elämästä ja voittamisen mindsetistä – sekä muistelee Leijonien ikimuistoisimpia hetkiä. 

Illalla suuntaamme legendaariselle Honda Centerille, jossa luvassa on kiihkeä paikallisottelu Anaheim Ducks vs. Los Angeles Kings. Suomalaisittain katseet kohdistuvat erityisesti maalinsuulle, kun Ville Husso saa tilaisuutensa loistaa – ja millä tavalla loistaakaan. Tiukka kamppailu venyy aina rankkareille asti, ja ilta huipentuu huikeaan ratkaisuun sekä Husson tunnelmiin pukukopissa pelin jälkeen.
***
Veikkaus Vetojen kanava tarjoaa sisältöä urheilun ja pelaamisen ystäville - tiukkaa asiaa ja asiantuntemusta ja kevyttä viihdettä - juuri sinulle.

videos.title: Hindi | 15th April, Tuesday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 15th April, Tuesday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch 15/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 15/04/26

videos.title: The Last Day of the Regular Season Will Decide the Avalanche Round 1 Opponent
videos.summary_source_text:
The Last Day of the Regular Season Will Decide the Avalanche Round 1 Opponent The Colorado Avalanche face playoff uncertainty as the Pacific Division chaos intensifies—will it be the Kings, Ducks, or Oilers in Round 1? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down wild tiebreaker scenarios, analyze key matchups, and weigh which opponent gives the Avalanche the best path forward. Is facing Connor McDavid and the Edmonton Oilers the greatest risk, or do the Los Angeles Kings present a more favorable showdown?

Listener questions spark spirited debate about Dallas Stars, Minnesota Wild, and “Cup or bust” mentalities, plus a heated comparison between Mikko Rantanen and Martin Nečas following their blockbuster swap. The episode also features bold predictions for the NHL playoffs, insights into Stanley Cup threats from the Eastern Conference like the Carolina Hurricanes and Tampa Bay Lightning, and a dose of locker room stories and fan humor. Are the Avalanche primed for a deep run—or will playoff surprises upend expectations?

videos.title: Stars Beat Sabres 4-3 In Shootout To Reach 50 Wins In Regular Season Finale | DLLS STARS POSTGAME
videos.summary_source_text:
Stars Beat Sabres 4-3 In Shootout To Reach 50 Wins In Regular Season Finale | DLLS STARS POSTGAME Check out Fran Duffy’s 2026 Diehard Draft Guide! https://alldlls.com/draftguide26/

The Dallas Stars recorded their 50th win of the 2025-26 regular season as they beat the Buffalo Sabres 4-3 in a shootout on Wednesday night at KeyBank Center. Mavrik Bourque opened the scoring with his 20th goal of the season. Trailing 2-1 in the second period, Esa Lindell scored a power play goal. After the Sabres answered for a 3-2 lead, Justin Hrykowian tied the game at 3-3. Neither team scored in the third period or overtime. Jason Robertson, Matt Duchene and Wyatt Johnston all scored in the shootout to give Dallas the victory. videos.title: Matthew Tkachuk Meets Media for Final Time This Season After Panthers Rout of Red Wings
videos.summary_source_text:
Matthew Tkachuk Meets Media for Final Time This Season After Panthers Rout of Red Wings Florida Panthers forward Matthew Tkachuk meets the media after his team drilled the visiting Detroit Red Wings 8-1 in the 2025-26 final game on Wednesday, April 15, 2026. 

The Panthers won three straight to end the season. 

Luke Kunin had two goals and an assist; rookie Mike Benning scored twice. Marek Alscher, Matthew Tkachuk, Cole Reinhardt, and Wilmer Skoog all had two-point nights. 

Daniil Tarasov had 24 saves for his third straight win. 

The two-time Stanley Cup champions will miss the playoffs for the first time since 2019. 

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

The Panthers Have Done It Again, Repeat as Cup Champs: https://floridahockeynow.com/florida-panthers-repeat-stanley-cup-champions-2025/

videos.title: PLAYOFF CROSSOVER PREVIEW! Carolina Hurricanes Round 1 Matchup Against the Ottawa Senators
videos.summary_source_text:
PLAYOFF CROSSOVER PREVIEW! Carolina Hurricanes Round 1 Matchup Against the Ottawa Senators The Carolina Hurricanes will take on the Ottawa Senators for the first time in the playoffs. What are the storylines heading into the series? What are some key stats to focus on? Who are going to be the X-Factors? Who will win the series and in how many games? On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach joins Ross and Brandon from Locked On Senators as the guys preview the upcoming Round 1 match-up of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs between the Hurricanes and Senators. After a wild season for both teams, how do they look going into the postseason? What are the biggest storylines from both sides? Secondly, the guys discuss key stats to focus on from both teams. They talk about expected goals, franchise records, players who stepped up during the season, and more. Finally, the guys conclude the show by discussing potential X-Factors for the Hurricanes and Senators. Who has the potential to take over the series? The guys also make their Round 1 predictions. Who will win the series, and in how many games? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Sam Steel Returns From Injury For Regular Season Finale In Buffalo – Game 82 | DLLS STARS PREGAME
videos.summary_source_text:
Sam Steel Returns From Injury For Regular Season Finale In Buffalo – Game 82 | DLLS STARS PREGAME Check out Fran Duffy’s 2026 Diehard Draft Guide! https://alldlls.com/draftguide26/

One more regular season game and then it’s on to the playoffs! The Dallas Stars will face the Buffalo Sabres tonight at KeyBank Center (6 p.m. CT) in both team’s 82nd game of the 2025-26 season. The Stars have won four games in a row and have a chance to reach the 50-win mark for the third consecutive season, something only five teams have accomplished in NHL history. The Sabres have executed a dramatic about-face this season. On December 8th they were in last place in the Eastern Conference and ranked 30th in the entire league. Since then, Buffalo caught fire, had a franchise-record 10 game winning streak along with another eight-game winning streak, posting an NHL-best 39-9-4 record (82 pts., 0.788) over their last 52 games. On tonight’s DLLS Stars Pregame Show, we will discuss all the big storylines, we will take a look at the expected lineups, we will hear from Stars head coach Glen Gulutzan about the latest injury updates about Roope Hintz & Miro Heiskanen and from Sabres head coach Lindy Ruff on his choice to rest some players in preparation for their first round playoff series against the Boston Bruins. Expected starting goaltenders: Jake Oettinger (DAL) vs. Colton Ellis (BUF).

One more regular season game and then it’s on to the playoffs! The Dallas Stars will face the Buffalo Sabres tonight at KeyBank Center (6 p.m. CT) in both team’s 82nd game of the 2025-26 season. The Stars have won four games in a row and have a chance to reach the 50-win mark for the third consecutive season, something only five teams have accomplished in NHL history. The Sabres have executed a dramatic about-face this season. On December 8th they were in last place in the Eastern Conference and ranked 30th in the entire league. Since then, Buffalo caught fire, had a franchise-record 10 game winning streak along with another eight-game winning streak, posting an NHL-best 39-9-4 record (82 pts., 0.788) over their last 52 games. On tonight’s DLLS Stars Pregame Show, we will discuss all the big storylines, we will take a look at the expected lineups, we will hear from Stars head coach Glen Gulutzan about the latest injury updates about Roope Hintz & Miro Heiskanen and from Sabres head coach Lindy Ruff on his choice to rest some players in preparation for their first round playoff series against the Boston Bruins. Expected starting goaltenders: Jake Oettinger (DAL) vs. Colton Ellis (BUF).

videos.title: How Train 2.0 Revolutionized Hockey Skill Development Coaching
videos.summary_source_text:
How Train 2.0 Revolutionized Hockey Skill Development Coaching The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

Google New Gemini Skillz Turn Chrome Into an AI Beast 👉 Try Seedance 2.0 on Higgsfield: https://higgsfield.ai/s/seedance-2-0-airevolutionx-yDYwTG
Google just dropped one of its biggest AI stretches in a while, and this one goes far beyond a simple model update. Chrome now gets Gemini Skills for reusable workflows, Gemini Enterprise is testing a new Agent tab, NotebookLM is adding Canvas and Connectors, DeepMind upgraded Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6 for real-world robotics, and Google Research introduced Vantage for measuring collaboration, creativity, and critical thinking. This is where Google starts turning Gemini into something much bigger than a chatbot.

videos.summary_source_text:
"I Smuggled the Corkscrew Into USA Hockey's Learn-to-Skate" | Matt Lieber "I Smuggled the Corkscrew Into USA Hockey's Learn-to-Skate" | Matt Lieber

In this episode of the Train 2.0 Show, Kevin McKinnon sits down with Matt Lieber, a former college teacher, hockey dad, Train 2.0 certified coach, and founder of Train 2.0 Hockey CT out of New Haven, Connecticut.

Matt's story is a great one: he coached bantam hockey after college, spent decades in education, and got back into the game through his son. After becoming a Train 2.0 member himself and seeing the gap between what he was being taught and what he was seeing his son's coaches teach, he decided to get certified and build a coaching business from the ground up, all in his 50s.

In this conversation we cover:
→ Matt's journey from educator to full-time hockey coach.
→ How video analysis completely changed his coaching effectiveness.
→ Why "fewer cues, more posture-focused cues" is the secret to player development.
→ Regressions, progressions, and how to assess a player in 10 seconds.
→ The girls he's coached who made Tier 2 national teams and "most improved" awards.
→ How he smuggled the corkscrew into the USA Hockey Learn-to-Skate curriculum.
→ Why the Train 2.0 coaching community is a differentiator.
→ Advice for coaches on the fence about certification.

If you're a coach, hockey parent, or player who's ever wondered what becoming a Train 2.0 certified coach really looks like, this episode is for you.

videos.title: The Most Overlooked Puck Protection Skill
videos.summary_source_text:
The Most Overlooked Puck Protection Skill The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: 3x World Long Drive Champ FIXED My Speed Training
videos.summary_source_text:
3x World Long Drive Champ FIXED My Speed Training Have I been speed training wrong?  A 55-year-old, 3x World Long Drive Champion showed me a completely different approach and new training program HIITS https://bit.ly/hiits-golfwell

I flew to Orlando to train with Fast Eddie Fernandes. Eddie is a 55-year-old, 3x World Long Drive Champion who developed the HIITS driver after years of trial and error with speed training. His approach is different from anything I've tried. You hit real golf balls at max effort using a weighted driver system (light, medium, heavy) instead of swinging at air. We did a full speed session, 24 swings, and Eddie showed me a 5-minute Rotex warmup that replaces the 25-30 minute gym routine I was doing at home.

Whether you're trying to swing faster, add distance, or just want a smarter approach to speed training that won't wreck your body, this is the full protocol from a guy who's been #1 in the world for over 200 weeks.

What you'll learn:
→ Why hitting balls at speed beats swinging at air for speed gains
→ The 5-minute Rotex warmup that replaces 30 minutes in the gym
→ How the HIITS driver works (light, medium, heavy protocol)
→ Why "more is better" is wrong for speed training
→ The 8-16 week timeline for turning peak speed into cruise speed
→ What the gap between training speed and on-course speed should look like
→ Why softer wrists and a relaxed trail arm unlock more club speed
→ Eddie's journey from Q-School and mini tours to 3x World Long Drive Champion

🔗 Try the HIITS Driver: https://bit.ly/hiits-golfwell
🔗 Follow Fast Eddie: https://www.instagram.com/fasteddie480/

📲 Subscribe to GolfWell: https://golfwell.co/email

videos.title: The EASIEST Iron I Have EVER Hit…..END OF?!
videos.summary_source_text:
The EASIEST Iron I Have EVER Hit…..END OF?! The easiest irons I have ever hit? Yeah, I surprised myself when I took on this test.  In this video, I test what might genuinely be the easiest iron I have EVER hit… and honestly, it could change the game for so many golfers, so many people are hyping up these irons!! 

If you’re a mid-handicap golfer struggling with consistency, strike, or confidence over the ball this could be exactly what you’ve been searching for.

We’re diving into:

Why this iron feels so easy to hit
Who it’s best suited for (mid handicappers, high handicappers & improving players)
Real performance on the course and range
Whether this could be one of the best irons of 2026

There are so many options out there when it comes to forgiving irons, but very few deliver this level of confidence and consistency.

If you're looking for:

The easiest irons to hit
The best irons for mid handicappers
Game improvement irons that actually perform

…then this is a must-watch.

👇 Let me know in the comments:
What irons are YOU currently using, and what do you struggle with most?

videos.title: 1 Scoop a Day — Clear Brain Fog, Boost Energy & Get Your Blood Flow Back
videos.summary_source_text:
1 Scoop a Day — Clear Brain Fog, Boost Energy & Get Your Blood Flow Back What if one simple daily habit could help clear brain fog, boost your energy, and restore healthy blood flow throughout your body? This powerful natural powder comes from raw cacao, one of the richest sources of flavanols, magnesium, and polyphenols found in nature. These compounds work deep inside your body by supporting nitric oxide production, helping your blood vessels relax and open so oxygen and nutrients can reach your brain, heart, and muscles more efficiently. The result is better mental clarity, improved focus, sustained energy, and healthier circulation from head to toe. Cacao also supports insulin sensitivity, helping stabilize blood sugar levels while reducing oxidative stress that contributes to fatigue and aging. Its natural compounds like epicatechin and theobromine enhance mood, promote relaxation, and support overall cognitive performance, while its prebiotic effects help nourish your gut microbiome, strengthening digestion and immune health. Whether you add it to your morning smoothie, yogurt, or oatmeal, just one daily scoop of high-quality, unsweetened cacao can help your body function at a higher level. Start with a small amount, especially if you are sensitive to stimulants, and take it earlier in the day for best results. This video is for educational purposes only and is not medical advice. Always consult your healthcare professional before making changes to your diet or health routine.

It might seem harmless… but the reason is actually more disturbing than you think.

👉 Get Dr. Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/3NKw6lv

In this video, Dr. Berg reacts to a viral experiment showing how foods like Oreos don’t easily catch fire. The explanation? These foods carbonize and form a heat shield, preventing them from igniting.

But that’s not the real danger. The real problem is what junk food does inside your body.

videos.title: David Duval “Cover The Ball”
videos.summary_source_text:
David Duval “Cover The Ball” David Duval had a special on Golf Channel a few years back, where he was talking about how he hit the driver amazing. And his feeling was that once he got from the top, He felt like the club started to steepen up. The right shoulder came on top like everything covered on top of this golf ball. Now for pros, that's good... for recreational golfers. That may be an absolute disaster. 
I recommend you use a training aid that is designed for recreational players like the Blue Brick, to ensure you are more in line with how the pros swing. videos.title: DRÖMKÖPET SOM SPÅRADE UR! Skulle jag köpt en elbil?
videos.summary_source_text:
DRÖMKÖPET SOM SPÅRADE UR! Skulle jag köpt en elbil? Att importera en drömbil kan se enkelt ut på pappret, men verkligheten på Autobahn är ofta en annan. Efter 40 år som motorjournalist borde jag ha förutsett strulet, men passionen för den sällsynta saffransgula Volvo C70:n tog överhanden. Följ med på en resa som börjar med ett lyckat köp i Berlin men som snabbt eskalerar till missljud, akuta verkstadsbesök hos "Auto Herbst" och en nervös väntan på reservdelar. Det här är den osminkade sanningen om bilimport: från den glödande lacken i vårsolen till den bittra fakturan och kampen för att ens ta sig över Öresundsbron.

Bli gärna medlem och stöd kanalen, som blir reklamfri! 29 kr/månad
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCU-4UJDGqQWK5Iv4wXDlzGQ/join

⚡️ Köp eller sälj elbil via Carla: https://carla.se
📉 Kolla vad din bil är värd hos Bilpriser: https://bilpriser.se
🔌 Smartare laddlösningar från Phasebox: https://phasebox.se
Haveri på vägen?
Som ni såg i filmen kan vad som helst hända med en 26 år gammal bil. Se till att ha ordning på grejerna du också:
https://www.mekonomen.se

00:00:00 – Inledningen: Den bittra insikten på verkstaden – vad är det som låter? []
00:00:23 – Mötet med René: Köpet genomförs och vi tar adjö av den tidigare ägaren i Berlin. []
00:01:03 – Katastrofen börjar: Första stoppet på Autobahn. Missljudet som inte går att ignorera. []
00:01:30 – Diagnosen: Vi hittar felet – ett hjullager som gett upp helt efter bara några mil. []
00:02:32 – Verkstadsjakt: Panik i Berlin – ringer runt till tyska Volvo-verkstäder på knagglig tyska. []
00:04:12 – Auto Herbst: Bilen rullar in på lyften. En första titt på undersidan av importen. []
00:06:49 – Berlin-paus: En ofrivillig sightseeing i väntan på delar. Checkpoint Charlie och muren. []
00:09:16 – Samtalet: En reflektion över pris, skick och varför man köper en 25 år gammal Volvo. []
01:11:52 – Reparationen: Delarna har kommit! Hjullagerbyte och en faktura på 485 Euro. []
01:17:40 – Frihet: Vi lämnar Berlin och trycker gasen i botten mot färjan i Puttgarden. []
01:22:06 – Varningen: Historien om norrmannen som förlorade sin Lamborghini – vi håller hastigheten. []
01:25:52 – Öresundsbron: Den vackra men nervösa sista etappen hem mot Sverige. []
01:26:40 – Hemma: En sammanfattning av resan och vad som väntar härnäst för C70:n. []

videos.title: Michelle Khare Eats the Spiciest Meal of Her Life | Heat Eaters
videos.summary_source_text:
Michelle Khare Eats the Spiciest Meal of Her Life | Heat Eaters Strap in - the Internet’s favorite stuntwoman, @MichelleKhare , is about to face her most dangerous mission yet: Chef Esther Choi’s kitchen. Michelle Khare is trading her harness for a fork as Esther serves up a fiery three-course gauntlet: spicy mushroom tempura, butter chicken & samosas, and a Last Dab lobster arrabiata.

While fighting through the spice, Michelle and Esther revisit her most death-defying feats - from escaping Houdini’s water tank to literally hanging off the side of a plane, and chef Esther puts Michelle through a spice-induced IQ quiz to see if she can retain any knowledge while her body goes into survival mode.

videos.title: Alla sa att jag skulle köpa elbil – jag importerade en svensk klassiker istället!
videos.summary_source_text:
Alla sa att jag skulle köpa elbil – jag importerade en svensk klassiker istället! Efter 40 år i branschen borde jag veta bättre än att köpa en 26 år gammal coupé i mörkret. Men när man står framför en av de bara 2 000 tillverkade saffransgula Volvo C70-coupéerna, så talar hjärtat högre än hjärnan. Följ med på en premiärtur som börjar i ren nostalgi utanför Berlin, men som snabbt förvandlas till en nervös väntan på tyska verkstäder. Det är en berättelse om svensk designhistoria, brittiskt chassikunnande och den tunna linjen mellan att äga en klassiker och att bli ägd av den.

Se del två direkt om du är medlem!

Bli gärna medlem och stöd kanalen, som blir reklamfri! 29 kr/månad
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCU-4UJDGqQWK5Iv4wXDlzGQ/join

⚡️ Köp eller sälj elbil via Carla: https://carla.se
📉 Kolla vad din bil är värd hos Bilpriser: https://bilpriser.se
🔌 Smartare laddlösningar från Phasebox: https://phasebox.se
Haveri på vägen?
Som ni såg i filmen kan vad som helst hända med en 26 år gammal bil. Se till att ha ordning på grejerna du också:
https://www.mekonomen.se

00:00:00 – Prolog: Den första varningssignalen på Autobahn – något svarvar och det låter illa.
00:00:23 – Bakgrunden: Varför jag sålde min Lexus och började leta efter en "sleeper".
00:00:54 – Avslöjandet: Här står den – en Volvo C70 Coupé från år 2000 i den rätta saffranslacken.
00:01:30 – Första mötet: Köp i mörker och en genomgång av bilens skick med den enda tidigare ägaren René.
00:02:40 – Besiktning: Genomgång av reservhjul balja och rostskydd (eller brist på behovet av det).
00:03:15 – Interiör & Service: 16 000 mil på mätaren, men varför lyser servicelampan?
00:03:40 – Historiklektion: Från Trabantresor till Moskva till köpet av en modern klassiker.
00:04:42 – Dagen efter: Pappersarbete, banköverföringar och utmaningen med att exportera bil från Tyskland.
00:05:29 – Provkörningen: Första gången bakom ratten i dagsljus – hur känns chassit och bromsarna?
00:06:20 – Pris & Strategi: Vad kostade lyxen år 2000 kontra idag? Och varför valdes bättre ljud framför navigation?
00:07:35 – Designanalys: Volvo går från fyrkantigt till känslomässigt – arvet från TWR och Uddevalla.
00:08:55 – Framtidsplaner: Trimning, lackfix och drömmen om att maximera "bil-livet".
00:09:30 – Vändningen: Resan hemåt börjar, men vi hinner bara 10 minuter innan vi landar på verkstaden... för första gången.

videos.title: Sam Reinhart Meets Florida Panthers Media for Final Time in 2025-26 NHL Season
videos.summary_source_text:
Sam Reinhart Meets Florida Panthers Media for Final Time in 2025-26 NHL Season Florida Panthers forward Sam Reinhart meets the media for the final time during the 2025-26 season on Wednesday, April 15, 2026. 

Reinhart has been out of the Panthers lineup with a foot injury the past few weeks.

The Panthers play host to the Detroit Red Wings tonight and have won two straight. They got more bad injury news with Tomas Nosek and Gus Forsling both out tonight.

videos.title: How to Make Pullups MUCH Easier
videos.summary_source_text:
How to Make Pullups MUCH Easier If you think a handful of pull-ups makes you strong… it might be time to rethink your standards.

In this video, I’m breaking down why pull-ups are one of the most brutally honest tests of upper body strength—and why so many people struggle with them despite training consistently. The issue isn’t effort. It’s what you’re training—and what you’re leaving out.

Most people overemphasize pressing movements like bench press and shoulder work while neglecting the muscles that actually drive pulling strength. Without strong scapular control, a developed upper back, and proper arm involvement beyond just biceps and triceps, your strength won’t carry over to the bar.

That’s why pull-ups expose everything:
Weak lats
Poor scapular function
Imbalances from years of bad posture
Gaps in real pulling strength

On top of that, pull-ups are a direct reflection of your strength-to-weight ratio. The more non-contributing mass you carry, the harder every rep becomes. But being under-muscled creates the same issue—you simply don’t have the force production to move your body efficiently.

This is what makes pull-ups such a powerful benchmark:
They don’t reward shortcuts
They don’t hide weaknesses
They don’t lie about your strength

Whether you’re trying to get your first rep or increase your total, improving your pull-ups requires building real, transferable strength through proper training—not just doing more reps.

If you want to improve your upper body strength, fix muscle imbalances, and start performing pull-ups the right way, you need a plan that addresses the entire chain involved in the movement.

For more tips on building muscle, correcting posture, stretching, and chronic aches and pains, be sure to stay tuned to this channel and remember to subscribe so you never miss another video from a physical therapist with a pro sports background as a PT and strength coach.

You can subscribe to this channel here - http://bit.ly/2b0coMW

👉 https://www.instagram.com/athleanx

Jeff earned his Masters of Physical Therapy and Bachelor’s of Physioneurobiology from the College of Health Sciences University of Connecticut Storrs. He is a certified Strength and Conditioning Specialist by the National Strength and Conditioning Association (NSCA). videos.title: IF Only You Knew This Swing Key Years Ago #shorts #golf #golfer #golfswing #ericcogorno
videos.summary_source_text:
IF Only You Knew This Swing Key Years Ago #shorts #golf #golfer #golfswing #ericcogorno #shorts 

Hips in the golf swing = the #1 key to solid ball striking. In this golf lesson, Eric Cogorno explains how to get your hips forward in the downswing.

🏌️ WORK WITH ERIC COGORNO IN PERSON! Two-Day Golf Schools in Florida and Pennsylvania - Limited Spots Available! 
👉 Register Here: https://bit.ly/48bbScn 

📱 GET THE SWING COACH APP The BEST Golf Swing Training App Ever Created 
👉 Download Here: https://inf.getswingcoach.com/EC1 

🎯 PERSONALIZED ONLINE COACHING Get Custom Golf Instruction from Eric Cogorno 
👉 Learn More: https://www.cogornogolf.com 

📚 STEP-BY-STEP TRAINING PROGRAMS Eric's Complete Golf Improvement System 
👉 Start Here: https://ericcogornogolf.podia.com 

🛒 RECOMMENDED GOLF EQUIPMENT & TRAINING AIDS:
• Takomo Golf - https://takomogolf.com
• Precision Impact Right Wrist Trainer - https://pureswingproducts.com/?sca_ref=1815522.bXQUsGp2bS (Code: COGORNO for $20 OFF)
• theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

In This Video, You'll Discover:
• The hip movement in the golf swing that every consistent ball striker shares — and the two specific reasons it controls both contact and direction 
• How to fix fat and thin shots for good by understanding how hip position in the downswing  directly controls where the club bottoms out 
• How to eliminate over-the-top pulls and fades with the lead knee "break the wall" drill — one of Eric Cogorno's go-to golf drills for getting the lower body forward immediately 
• How to unlock the trail side "through the ball" feel that completes hip rotation without losing club face control — essential golf swing tips for any high handicap golfer 
• How to stop hanging back with a two-part mantra ("lead side down and forward, trail side through") that simplifies the entire golf swing sequence 
• How to use golf swing analysis in real time with the Swing Coach AI app to instantly see whether your hips are forward or back on every single swing 
• Exactly how PGA Tour players like Scottie Scheffler, Colin Morikawa, and Tommy Fleetwood drive their hips 4–6 inches forward while keeping their head back — and how you can replicate that in your own game

Eric Cogorno breaks down one of the most misunderstood fundamentals in this golf lesson: getting the hips well forward to start the downswing is non-negotiable for solid, consistent ball striking. Whether you're just learning how to play golf or trying to break 90, this hip movement is the fastest path to hitting ball-first contact. The SwingCoach app, featured throughout this video, color-codes your hip position after every swing and includes in-app instruction from Eric to help you fix it on the spot. For more on lower body sequencing and golf swing tips, check out the next recommended video.

#HipsInGolfSwing #Downswing #GolfLesson #HighHandicapGolfer #GolfSwingTips #GolfSwingCoach #GolfSwing #GolfDrills #GolfSwingAnalysis #HowToPlayGolf #EricCogorno #PGATour #Golf

The AI landscape is changing fast:
OpenAI models dominate high-level reasoning,
Google’s Gemini leads in multimodal,
Meta’s Llama is open-source and flexible,
and DeepSeek is driving costs down dramatically.

Prices are dropping. Capabilities are leapfrogging. Nothing is stable.

Think of AI like electricity — you don’t stay loyal, you use what works best.
